deploy_steps: Install dependencies (npm ci if docs/package.json else npm install -g vitepress)
Build VitePress site (npm run docs:build else npx vitepress build docs)
push_target: none (uses actions/deploy-pages@v4 official Pages publisher; no git push to gh-pages)
root_cause_404: Repo has no vitepress.config.{ts,js,mjs} and docs/ contains no .vitepress/ directory. The build step npx vitepress build docs has no config to consume, so the artifact uploaded from docs/.vitepress/dist is either empty or never produced; the deployed Pages site therefore serves no index.html, producing 404.
fix_recommendation: Add a real VitePress project at docs/.vitepress/config.ts with at minimum { title, srcDir, outDir: 'docs/.vitepress/dist' } and an index.md under docs/, or change the build step to point at an existing srcDir. Until then the deploy workflow will continue to publish an empty/garbage artifact and the Pages URL will 404.
